title: Character Goals
entries: Be a master in their field.
End the suffering of a friend.
End the suffering of a family member.
Find a lost artifact of immense power.
Conquer a rival kingdom and expand their empire.
Seek revenge against a powerful enemy.
Protect their loved ones from an impending danger.
Discover the secrets of ancient magic.
Free their people from the oppression of a tyrannical ruler.
Purify a cursed land and restore its fertility.
Master the arts of elemental magic.
Unite warring factions to prevent a catastrophic war.
Embark on a pilgrimage to a sacred site for divine enlightenment.
Retrieve a legendary weapon to defend their homeland.
Uncover a hidden society of shape-shifters living among humans.
Become a renowned scholar and unlock the secrets of ancient texts.
Earn the respect of their ancestors through great deeds.
Seek redemption for a past betrayal and seek forgiveness.
Champion the rights of magical creatures and forge peace with humans.
Find a lost family heirloom and restore their family's honor.
Bring balance to the forces of nature and prevent a cataclysmic event.
Assist a celestial being on a divine quest to save the world.
Break a powerful curse that plagues their entire bloodline.
Defeat a legendary monster that terrorizes their village.
Discover a hidden portal to another realm and explore its wonders.
Create a utopian society where all beings live in harmony.
Ascend to godhood and reshape the world according to their will.
Protect a sacred forest from destruction by human settlers.
Find the fabled Fountain of Youth to prolong their life.
Build a magnificent city and become a visionary ruler.
Uncover the truth behind a prophecy that foretells their destiny.
Become a legendary musician and inspire people through their music.
Establish a peaceful alliance between feuding magical creatures.
Lead a rebellion against a ruthless and power-hungry sorcerer.
Seek wisdom and enlightenment from a reclusive wise hermit.
Become the greatest hunter and track down elusive mythical beasts.
Convince a powerful dragon to share its hoard for the greater good.
Learn the art of time manipulation and alter the course of history.
Find a lost civilization hidden deep within a treacherous jungle.
Overcome a crippling phobia that has haunted them for years.
Defend a sacred temple from an army of malevolent spirits.
Discover the truth behind a tragic family curse and break it.
Solve a riddle left by an ancient sorcerer to unlock a powerful spell.
Build a monument to honor fallen heroes and inspire future generations.
Travel to the realm of dreams and confront their inner fears.
